values.description: Base URL of the running TestRail Mock service
Fixed email credential for this mock. Only this value is accepted.
Fixed API key for this mock. Used as the password in Basic Auth (email:api_key). Also accepted as a Bearer token.
Pre-computed base64(admin@testrail.mock:MockAPI@123). Use as: Authorization: Basic YWRtaW5AdGVzdHJhaWwubW9jazpNb2NrQVBJQDEyMw==
Project ID used in requests. Auto-updated when you run Add Project.
Section ID used in requests. Auto-updated when you run Add Section.
Test Case ID used in requests. Auto-updated when you run Add Case.
Test Run ID used in requests. Auto-updated when you run Add Run.
